name: agent-browser
description: Browser automation for AI agents. Navigate web pages, interact with elements, take screenshots, and record video.

functions.name: open
functions.description: Navigate to a URL and initialize the browser session.

functions.name: snapshot
functions.description: Re-fetch the current page state and element @e references.

functions.name: interact
functions.description: Perform an action on a page element using its @e reference.

action.description: The type of interaction to perform.

target_ref.description: Target element for drag and drop.
